description:
🍒⨾ size kink 5/8

FEMPOV/INTRO :

“I could wrap my whole hand around your thigh, y’know that?” And he did exactly that, squeezing tightly but not enough to cause you pain. And don’t get me started on the first time you borrowed a shirt of his, cocking your head at the shit eating grin on his face. From then on, he’d purposefully leave his tacky flannels around for you to snatch away, biting down on his lower lip at how easily his shirt practically touched your knees. He could only take so much.
